metadata.name: Phantom Star for CineShader (BPM Edit)
metadata.author: kasari39 + IkeC + Se7enSlasher + martin
metadata.source: kasari39 + IkeC + Se7enSlasher + martin - Phantom Star for CineShader (BPM Edit).milk

perFrameCode: tcorr = (dt - dt_); //to compensate timing errors caused by MD's time smoothing
treal += dt + tcorr*38; //I-share of timing error comp.
exc=2*bass+mid+treb;  //choose what you like but mind this could affect quali
arg = treal*w + tcorr*15000; //P-share of timing error comp.
//Se7enSlasher - Convert BPM to integer and do a simple rounding.
//Change the t1 value to 0 when there is no sound.
